data.title: NWN Launches New Cybersecurity Offering with AI-Enabled Managed Security Operations, Expanded Strategic Partnerships, and New Platform Integrations
data.description: In Boston, NWN, a prominent AI-driven technology solutions provider, unveiled NWN Cybersecurity, a managed security operations suite integrating AI. This launch includes fresh managed services, wider security partnerships with leading firms such as Palo Alto Networks and Cisco, and enhanced platform integrations through NWN's proprietary Experience Management Platform (EMP). These initiatives aim to assist companies in enhancing security operations utilizing AI technologies, fostering innovation in the current era.

data.title: StreamYard Founders Put $10 Million Behind Livid, the Startup Helping Vimeo Users Escape Before the Next Round of Price Increases
data.description: A new ad-free video hosting platform called Livid in Dover, Delaware, has secured $10 million in funding from Geige Vandentop and Dan Briggs, co-founders of StreamYard. StreamYard was built by Vandentop and Briggs before it was sold to Hopin for $250 million. The funding also saw Bending Spoons eventually acquiring StreamYard. Livid has also launched L.O.V.E. (Livid One-click Video Exporter), a migration tool that allows bulk-export of entire Vimeo content for free.

data.title: ASGN Incorporated to Change Corporate Name and NYSE Ticker to Everforth
data.description: ASGN Incorporated (NYSE: ASGN) will be rebranding as Everforth, Inc. on April 24, 2026. The company's new ticker symbol on the New York Stock Exchange will be “EFOR” starting on the same day. This change follows the Company’s November 20, 2025 transformation announcement and is aimed at presenting a cohesive brand identity. Stockholders do not need to take any action regarding this transition.

data.title: The SBB Research Group Foundation Sponsors Salute, Inc.
data.description: In Chicago, Salute, Inc. teamed up with the SBB Research Group Foundation to participate in a volunteer effort. The SBB Research Group Foundation, known for its partnership with local nonprofits in its Champion A Charity Program, facilitated the visit. Volunteers from the foundation visited a veteran who had relocated to a memory care facility. Staged by Salute, Inc., a nonprofit focused on aiding military service personnel, veterans, and their families during crises, the volunteers brought.

data.title: Global Mofy Enters into Strategic Cooperation with Infinigence AI to Jointly Build an Industrial-Grade AIGC Content Creation Platform
data.description: On April 8, 2026, Global Mofy AI Limited (Nasdaq: GMM), a company specializing in generative AI technology for virtual content production and 3D digital assets, announced a strategic partnership with Shanghai Infinigence AI Co., Ltd. The collaboration aims to develop an industrial-grade AIGC content creation platform for industrial scenarios by leveraging their expertise in AI infrastructure and digital content. The product is in the development phase and will be launched to the public soon. This partnership signifies a move towards intelligent, collaborative, and industrialized digital content production.

data.title: Cavitation Technologies Confirms Proof of Funds for Proposed Acquisition by European Guarantee Services S.à.r.l.
data.description: Chatsworth, California - April 08, 2026 - Cavitation Technologies, Inc. (CTi), a notable player in advanced fluid processing and water treatment technologies, revealed the reception of financial documentation from European Guarantee Services S.à.r.l. (EGS) regarding the Letter of Intent (LOI) for the proposed complete cash acquisition of the Company. CTi, listed on OTCQB under CVAT, is set to finalize the deal with EGS as they progress in acquisition discussions.

data.title: Pillar To Post Appoints D'Wayne Tanner as Vice President of Franchise Development
data.description: Experienced franchise executive appointed to spearhead strategic expansion and enhance relationships with franchise business owners in the home inspection industry. Based in Tampa, Florida, the renowned Pillar To Post Home Inspectors (Pillar To Post) declared on April 8, 2026, via PRNewswire, that their new leader will focus on driving growth in their franchise network. Pillar To Post stands as the largest home inspection company across North America.

data.title: PuroClean is on the Move with an Active Leadership Presence at Major Industry Events in 2026
data.description: TAMARAC, Florida - In a recent development on April 8, 2026, PuroClean, a prominent property restoration and remediation franchise brand in North America, has been instrumental in bolstering collaboration within the restoration and insurance sectors. By enhancing connectivity across the ecosystem, the franchise is demonstrating leadership in the industry.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: HumanX to Ring Remote Bell with 350+ Speakers On Site
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) releases a daily pre-market advisory directly from its trading floor. The NYSE issued an update on April 8, 2026. This advisory offers insights into the market before the trading day begins. Investors can access today's NYSE Pre-market update for significant information.

data.title: Agiloft, Honeywell, Royal Caribbean, and WSP to Share How CLM Unlocked Millions in Financial Impact at CLOC Global Institute 2026
data.description: Agiloft Chief Legal Officer Jason Barnwell led a discussion where global enterprises exchanged insights on how they turned legal operations into a quantifiable asset through frameworks, metrics, and architecture. The event took place in REDWOOD CITY, Calif., on April 8, 2026. Agiloft, a frontrunner in the industry, organized the session.
